name: DoD CDAO / Thunderforge (Agent Network)
summary: CDAO accelerates AI adoption boardroom-to-battlefield; programs include Agent Network (Thunderforge), Swarm Forge, Maven Smart System, War Data Platform. Realigned 2025 under USD(R&E).
killinchu_fit: Killinchu's signed, replayable, interpretable sense-and-evidence decisions map onto CDAO's 'interpretable results' + 'rapid + secure AI agent deployment' language. The Yuyay-13 gate + Khipu receipts give Agent Network agents an auditable governance overlay.
hooks: Agent Network: auditable agent decisions via Khipu receipts + Lean-proved total-order chain
Maven-adjacent object detection/track -> Killinchu sense-and-evidence overlay (governance, not a Maven competitor)
GenAI.mil/Enterprise Agents: 13-axis Lambda gate as a Responsible-AI guardrail
